citation_label: CRA Form T89 2025 Alberta Stock Savings Plan Tax Credit
heading: CRA Form T89 2025 Alberta Stock Savings Plan Tax Credit
body:
Title: CRA Form T89 2025 Alberta stock savings plan tax credit.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/en/revenue-agency/services/forms-publications/forms/t89.html
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/t89/t89-25e.pdf

CRA Form T89 2025 is for an individual who resided in Alberta on the last day of 2025 and had an unused stock savings plan tax credit amount to carry forward to 2025. Line 1 enters the unused Alberta stock savings plan tax credit amount from 2024, from line 4 of the 2024 Form T89. Line 2 enters Alberta tax from line 42800 of the 2025 return. Line 3 is the Alberta stock savings plan tax credit and enters whichever is less, line 1 or line 2, on T1 line 47900. Line 4 subtracts line 3 from line 1 to calculate the unused Alberta stock savings plan tax credit amount to carry forward to a future year.

metadata.title: CRA Form T89 2025 Alberta Stock Savings Plan Tax Credit
